name: Putrajaya (Malaysia)

colors.symbolism: royalty and the sovereignty of the Yang di-Pertuan Agong, on the central band and the arms

description: Three vertical bands of blue, yellow (double width), and blue, with the coat of arms of Malaysia - two tigers supporting a shield beneath a crescent and fourteen-pointed star - on the central yellow band.
history: Putrajaya, a planned city south of Kuala Lumpur, became Malaysia's administrative capital and its third Federal Territory on 1 February 2001. Its flag, adopted the same day, places the national coat of arms on a blue-yellow-blue vertical triband.

features.role: Coat of arms of Malaysia (two tigers supporting a shield beneath a crescent and 14-pointed star)
